YOUR JOURNEY

How it Works?

It’s simple. We give you a demo trading account to prove your skills in our Evaluation. After successfully completing the Evaluation, you earn real money.

STEP 1

EVALUATION PHASE

Complete The Evaluation

Complete your chosen Evaluation by achieving the required Profit Targets, while keeping within the defined Daily Drawdown and Total Drawdown limits.

STEP 2

FUNDED PHASE

Earn as a Funded Trader

After completing the Evaluation, you become a Funded Trader. You receive a new demo trading account where you earn up to 100% of the profits in real money.

STEP 3

PAYOUT

Receive Your Payout

Receive your Payout from your Funded Account Profits as soon as 7 days after your first trade on your Funded Account. Enjoy Fast Payouts through your preferred Payout Method.

CHOOSE YOUR JOURNEY

Your Funding Journey Starts Here

Choose the account plan that best fits your trading style, goals, and personal preferences — and Get Funded Today!

OUR BENEFITS

Why Traders Love BrightFunded?

BrightFunded delivers the industry's top-rated Modern Prop Trading Firm experience.

Real Trading Expertise

BrightFunded is led and advised by Professionals from Central Banks, Leading Brokers, and Modern Prop Industry.

Competitive Spread & High Leverage

Trade with spreads starting from 0.0 Pips and up to 1:100 Leverage.

Multi-Asset Trading

Trade across forex, digital assets, indices, and commodities with precision.

Best Trading Platforms

Trade on the industry's Most Popular Trading Platforms — including MetaTrader 5.

24/7 Live Fast Support

Access 24/7 Live Personal Support with responses in seconds.

GLOBAL TEAM

Global Presence, Dedicated Team

BrightFunded is powered by a global team of over 30 dedicated professionals with extensive experience at Central Banks and the world's leading Modern Prop Trading Firms.

REVIEWS

Hear From Our Traders

Real traders. Real stories. See what real traders like you are saying about our Industry-Leading Modern Prop Trading Firm.

For start they don't have... 

What can I say other than that this prop firm blows the rest out of the park. With extensive experience of prop firms over the last few years, I've not found one that even comes close to this one and it goes to show just how disreputable alot of the others are when Brightfunded does what they do. Phase 2 credentials immediately upon passing phase 1, funded account credentials the next day and most importantly…

Robert W

Prop firm that doesn’t try to scam you

Perfect example of a prop firm that is made for traders. No scammy trading rules, everything is made clear on their website. 8% profit target with a max daily loss of 5% and an overall max loss of 10% is perfectly reasonable. Also it is a fixed max drawdown, not a trailing drawdown like some other shitty prop firms. The few rules Brightfunded has just make sense to improve your risk management....

Marius

Exceptional Experience with Bright Funded

I’ve been trading with “Bright Funded” for the past three months, and I’m thoroughly impressed. Their platform is transparent, their payouts are reliable, and they’ve stayed true to every promise they’ve made. Zero complaints so far just a seamless, professional experience. For aspiring traders looking for a trustworthy prop firm, Bright Funded...

Irfan Haider

First withdrawal: One of the best in the market

Hello Brightfunded team, I just want to take a moment to say thank you for the perfect service you provide. The customer support and there speed are on another level in the Prop Firm industry. So fast and willing to help!!!! I have bought 5 challenges and got 2 payouts. All my payouts are paid smooth and within 8 hours from request. I believe brightfunded will be a top player soon!!!!

Enz prop trades

huge thank you to BrightFunded for my…

huge thank you to BrightFunded for my 6th payout from the same account! Their efficiency and reliability continue to impress me. I received my payout in less than 14 hours, proving once again that they are one of the best in the industry. BrightFunded is truly setting the standard for prop firms! Highly recommended💙💯

Asiya Haruna Muhammad

TRADE2EARN

Discover Our Loyalty Program

At BrightFunded, we believe you should be rewarded for your daily commitment and dedication to trading, regardless of your results. That's why we developed the groundbreaking loyalty concept: Trade2Earn.

Get Funded

Learn more

Trade

Each trade, profitable or losing, yields BrightFunded Tokens as a reward. Each phase of The Evaluation process participates in Trade2Earn.

Earn

As you navigate your trading journey, the BrightFunded Tokens accumulate based on the volume (lots) you trade, stacking up in your wallet in the dashboard.

Spend

Use your BrightFunded Tokens on trading perks to enhance your Payouts or enjoy Free Evaluations! Ready to elevate your journey?

Be Part Of The Revolution And Join Our Global Team
